headline: These S&P 500 Dividend Stocks Are Quietly Crushing the Index — And Paying You Monthly
summary: The S&P 500 index includes a broad variety of companies. Some of them pay little to no dividends, while others offer decent yields. Among the S&P 500 companies that pay dividends, the vast majority of them distribute cash payments to the shareholders once every three months. Only a few of them pay dividends on a ... These S&P 500 Dividend Stocks Are Quietly Crushing the Index — And Paying You Monthly

headline: Will Bushore’s Planned Exit Reshape Realty Income's (O) M&A and Governance Narrative?
summary: Realty Income Corporation recently disclosed that Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, General Counsel and Secretary Michelle Bushore will leave the company after a transition period running through September 2, 2026, while a search is underway for her successor. Her planned departure matters for investors because she was central to key M&A deals and governance practices, raising questions about continuity in legal oversight as Realty Income continues to grow. With this leadership...

headline: Time for Boomers to Play It Safe: Our 5 Safest Monthly Pay Dividend Stocks
summary: While many Baby Boomers have enjoyed a long bull market over the past 35 years, there is a point when income becomes more critical than stock appreciation. The reason is simple: those who leave their careers to enjoy a well-deserved retirement lose the benefits of a regular salary and their jobs, such as 401(k) matching ... headline: Realty Income Plans Legal Leadership Transition While Pursuing Ongoing M&A Growth
summary: Realty Income (NYSE:O) announced the orderly departure of Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer Michelle Bushore. Bushore, who played a key role in prior M&A activity and governance, is leaving her position while the company searches for her successor. The company emphasized continuity in legal and governance oversight during this leadership transition. Realty Income, a large net lease real estate company listed on the NYSE under ticker O, depends heavily on legal and governance...
